Petition For Order Authorizing Personal Representative To Compromise And Settle Creditor'S Suit.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Allowing Late Claim
Off Calendar Jul-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for and with Michele Brewster. Derek Johnson (Brother) in propria persona.

The Court stated that it had read all the papers and responses. Ms. Eisenberg argued that they met Probate Code 9103 requirements and that Mr. Johnson noted that he didn't serve her client. Mr. Johnson argued that Michele never presented herself as a creditor, that some of her dates are wrong, that Michele knew about the probate from the beginning, that she never told him that she was owed any money, and that he asked Michele if his Niece Alexis could stay with her until she finished school. Ms. Eisenberg presented additional argument stating that Mr. Johnson's own testimony supports that he knew she was a creditor, that Mr. Johnson never told Ms. Brewster that he was going to file a petition for probate, and that they filed their own petition not knowing that a petition for probate was in place. The Court took the matter under submission. Ms. Brewster stated that from the beginning Derek promised to pay her, that she let Alexis stay with her until she was out of school in June, that if it wasn't for her there would be an inheritance, that when the decedent got sick she helped him, that she paid his note, and that they were going to move to Texas.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Johnson in Prporia Persona. Diana Rothemel (Friend of family) also present.

The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2009 Continued To Jul-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
